steps.observed: Form displayed with 'Sell exact' (pressed/active) and 'Buy exact' buttons

steps.expected: Two toggle buttons for exactIn and targetOut
steps.observed: 'Sell exact' and 'Buy exact' buttons visible in a toggle row between Amount and From Token fields
'Buy exact' became pressed/active, 'Sell exact' became inactive

steps.action: Set chain to Ethereum, click 'Buy exact', keep default tokens USDC->WETH
steps.observed: Buy exact pressed, provider notice shown

steps.expected: API call with mode=targetOut, results show required input
steps.observed: URL shows mode=targetOut; result card shows 'YOU PAY (REQUIRED): 2186651.83783 USDC' via Curve

steps.action: Verify API response via curl: GET /compare?chainId=1&from=USDC&to=WETH&amount=1000&slippageBps=50&mode=targetOut
steps.expected: mode: targetOut in response with input_amount
steps.observed: Response: mode=targetOut, input_amount=2186651.83783, output_amount=1000, recommendation=curve

steps.expected: Output Amount (desired) and Input Amount (required) labels
steps.observed: Details show 'Output Amount (desired): 1000 WETH' and 'Input Amount (required): 2186651.83783 USDC'

evidence.network: GET /compare?chainId=1&from=0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48&to=0xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2&amount=1000&slippageBps=50&mode=targetOut -> 200. Response: spandex=null (no providers), curve={input_amount: 2186651.83783, output_amount: 1000, mode: targetOut}

assertions.title: Provider coverage note in targetOut mode

steps.action: Click 'Buy exact' to enter targetOut mode
steps.expected: Warning notice about reduced provider coverage
steps.observed: Warning box appeared: '⚠️ Fewer providers support reverse quotes (3/7 Spandex providers)'

steps.action: Click 'Sell exact' to return to exactIn mode
steps.observed: Warning box disappeared when switching back to Sell exact

assertions.title: Gas cost displayed per quote in ETH

steps.expected: Quote cards show gas cost in ETH
steps.observed: Spandex quote card shows 'Gas Cost: 0.000029 ETH' (visible in both card summary and expanded details). Gas Units: 512461 shown in details.
Spandex: gas_used=431189, gas_cost_eth=0.000019. Curve: gas_cost_eth=0 (gas estimation requires funded sender - known quirk). gas_price_gwei=0.0443

steps.expected: Gas Cost field shows ETH value
steps.observed: Details section shows 'Gas Cost: 0.000029 ETH' and 'Gas Units: 512461'

evidence.network: GET /compare?chainId=1&from=USDC&to=WETH&amount=1000&slippageBps=50 -> 200. Spandex: gas_used=431189, gas_cost_eth=0.000019. Curve: gas_cost_eth=0 (known quirk: requires funded sender).

assertions.issues: Curve gas_cost_eth is always 0 because gas estimation requires a funded sender address. This is a known limitation documented in user-testing.md.

assertions.title: Gas-adjusted comparison for all token pairs

steps.action: Compare WETH->USDT on Ethereum (non-ETH output, amount=1)
steps.expected: System fetches outputToken->ETH rate for gas normalization
steps.observed: API response includes output_to_eth_rate=0.000496, output_value_eth=0.998950, net_value_eth=0.998950. UI shows 'Rate: 1 USDT = 0.000496 ETH'

steps.action: Check UI reason and rate display
steps.observed: Reason section shows 'Rate: 1 USDT = 0.000496 ETH'. Recommended card shows 2012.239637 USDT via Curve.
Net Value (after gas): 0.999009 ETH - confirming output was normalized to ETH via the fetched rate

steps.expected: Net value after gas shown per quote
steps.observed: Spandex details: Gas Cost=0.000029 ETH, Net Value (after gas)=0.496305 ETH. Output was 0.49633350319423968 WETH, net = output - gas.

steps.expected: Net value after gas in ETH even for non-ETH output
steps.observed: Curve details: Net Value (after gas)=0.999009 ETH (for 2012.239637 USDT output at rate 0.000496 ETH/USDT, minus gas)
Spandex: net_value_eth=0.496780 for USDC->WETH. Curve: net_value_eth=0.998950 for WETH->USDT

evidence.network: Confirmed net_value_eth field in API responses for both ETH and non-ETH output tokens

assertions.title: Graceful fallback when price unavailable

steps.action: Compare USDC->DAI on Ethereum (both non-ETH, outputToken->ETH rate may fail)
steps.expected: Falls back to raw output comparison with gas shown separately, no crash
steps.observed: API: output_to_eth_rate=null, output_value_eth=0 for both quotes. Recommendation falls back to raw output: 'Spandex (kyberswap) outputs 0.084156 DAI more (+0.008%). Gas estimates unavailable for Curve, comparing raw output only.'

steps.action: Verify UI shows gas cost in ETH alongside
steps.expected: Gas cost still displayed in ETH for informational purposes
steps.observed: UI shows 'GAS COST: 0.000031 ETH' on the Spandex card, even though the comparison uses raw output. No crash or error.

steps.action: Confirm no errors in console or response
steps.observed: No console errors. API returns valid JSON with recommendation. App continues working.

evidence.network: GET /compare?chainId=1&from=USDC&to=DAI&amount=1000&slippageBps=50 -> 200. output_to_eth_rate=null. Spandex: gas_cost_eth=0.000029, output_value_eth=0, net_value_eth=-0.0000188. Curve: gas_cost_eth=0, output_value_eth=0. Recommendation: spandex (raw output comparison fallback).

assertions.issues: When output_to_eth_rate cannot be fetched (DAI case), the net_value_eth for Spandex becomes slightly negative (-0.0000188) because gas cost is subtracted from a 0 ETH value. The recommendation still correctly uses raw output comparison. This is acceptable fallback behavior.

steps.action: Navigate to app, select Ethereum chain
steps.observed: Chain dropdown shows 'Ethereum (1)'
From: USDC (0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48), To: WETH (0xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2)

steps.action: Click 'Buy exact' to switch to targetOut
steps.observed: 'Buy exact' pressed, '⚠️ Fewer providers support reverse quotes (3/7 Spandex providers)' notice visible
Amount field shows 0.5
URL: mode=targetOut. Result: 'YOU PAY (REQUIRED): 1007.576922 USDC' via Curve. Only Curve returned a quote.
URL: /compare?chainId=1&from=...&to=...&amount=0.5&slippageBps=50&mode=targetOut

frictions.description: Auto-refresh (15s interval) collapses expanded Details section and changes DOM refs, making it difficult to take screenshots of expanded details. Had to use page.evaluate to stop auto-refresh timer before interacting.
frictions.resolution: Used page.evaluate(() => clearInterval(window._refreshTimer)) and also monkey-patched setInterval to block new refresh timers

frictions.description: Playwright MCP tools lose page context between operations (page navigates to about:blank), requiring re-navigation. run_code approach more reliable for multi-step sequences.
frictions.resolution: Used playwright browser_run_code for multi-step interactions, and browser_navigate to recover from lost page context

frictions.description: Spandex provider frequently returns no quotes for certain pairs (WETH->USDT, USDC->WETH in targetOut) - likely due to provider rate limits or API key issues. Only Curve returns results in many tests.
frictions.resolution: Documented as observed behavior; Curve quotes still validate the assertion requirements

summary: Tested 8 assertions: all 8 passed. VAL-REV-001/002/003 confirm direction toggle, targetOut results with required input amounts, and provider coverage notice (3/7). VAL-GAS-001/002/003/004 confirm gas cost in ETH per quote, gas-adjusted comparison for non-ETH outputs via outputToken->ETH rate, net value after gas display, and graceful fallback when rate unavailable. VAL-CROSS-002 confirms the full reverse quote end-to-end flow. Curve gas_cost_eth is 0 due to known limitation requiring funded sender. USDC->DAI fallback correctly uses raw output comparison when no ETH rate available.
